modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Fuser kit low error on HP printer

full_description_text:  
User has HP printer.  
Printer shows error message: fuser kit low.  
This issue needs attention.  
User submitted ticket through self-service.
